name: Grox Captain – Spore
description:
Create your own scenario type of bot, for now possibly. I may update in the future with additional initial messages or create other grox bots for that. I'm testing some stuff out with this one, like making a lorebook.

I've been really into Spore again lately, and I've always found the Grox Empire interesting so basically I figured I'd make a bot. It's not like the game goes into detail about grox anatomy so there'll be some headcanon scattered in here.
creator: MonstrumSpinam
